allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "===== ReBAR via NVIDIA BAR1 \(BAR1~=VRAM => ReBAR ON; ~256MB => OFF\) ====="; try { & nvidia-smi -q | Select-String -Pattern "BAR1|Product Name|Total" | Select-Object -First 12 } catch { Write-Output "nvidia-smi not found" }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "===== PCIe SLOTS \(Win32_SystemSlot\) ====="; Get-CimInstance Win32_SystemSlot | Select-Object SlotDesignation, CurrentUsage, @{n='Width';e={$_.MaxDataWidth}}, Status | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "===== PnP: BAR/Large-memory hint for NVIDIA ====="; Write-Output "\(Above-4G/ReBAR is a platform default on Arrow Lake; verifying BAR1 above is the real test\)")

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\work\\commandcenter; python -m tools.workflow.reference_runner fixtures/workflow/sample-work-item.md "$env:TEMP\\cc-dispatch-demo" --scenario policy-blocked --policy fixtures/workflow/policy/policy.json | Select-Object -Last 12; python -m tools.workflow.reference_runner fixtures/workflow/sample-work-item.md "$env:TEMP\\cc-dispatch-demo2" --scenario policy-experiment --policy fixtures/workflow/policy/policy.json | python -c "import json,sys; s=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('status:', s['status']\)")

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\work\\commandcenter; python -m tools.workflow.reference_runner fixtures/workflow/sample-work-item.md "$env:TEMP\\cc-dispatch-demo2" --scenario policy-experiment --policy fixtures/workflow/policy/policy.json > $null; python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(r'$env:TEMP\\cc-dispatch-demo2\\sample-work-item\\artifacts\\decisions\\dec_assign_001.json'\)\); print\(json.dumps\({'selected': d['selected'], 'reason': d['decision_reason'], 'ram_prediction': d['predictions']['expected_peak_ram_mb'], 'influence': d['policy_influence']}, indent=2\)\)")
